# Plan: Workflow Outputs — First-Class YAML Capability

## Context

The WUI currently saves all completed workflow data to a single hard-coded path:

This fires once at completion. There is no per-workflow configuration, no support for
multiple output destinations, and no incremental (per-step) saving.

**Goal**: Make `outputs:` a first-class array in the workflow YAML. Each entry declares
a path template a
